2. Endtroducing.....

3. TURN ON THE BRIGHT LIGHTS [Vinyl]

4. Ocean Rain

7. Franz Ferdinand

Negative Aspects: Not the most original, many reference points

8. Antics
Positive Aspects: Poppier, Immediate, Accomplished sophomore album, Processional opener, Brilliant tracks like 'Evil' and 'Slow Hands', Aggressive and relentless beat, Beautiful and atmospheric verses, Dark yet beautiful sound

9. Nocturama

Positive Aspects: Memorable tunes, Bursting pop chorus, Sonic interest, Literary lyrics

User Preference Elements: Quality of music, Captivating tracks, Originality, Literary lyrics
